user.title: 💡 Add Smart Bulb Reset
user.description: Link a smart bulb to the relay that powers it. Enables one-command power-cycling and future auto-heal automations.

auto_discover.title: 💡 Auto-discovered pairings
auto_discover.description: Select a relay → bulb pairing to configure. Candidates are IKEA or Hue lights that share an area with a Shelly relay.

manual.title: 💡 Manual pairing
manual.description: Select the relay switch and the smart bulb it powers.

abort.already_configured: This relay/bulb pairing is already configured.

no_relay_for_light.message: No relay is paired with {entity_id}. Add a pairing via the Smart Bulb Reset integration first.

unsupported_entity.message: Unsupported entity {entity_id}: expected a light or switch.

power_cycle.name: Power-cycle relay
power_cycle.description: Power-cycles the relay that powers a paired smart bulb, or any switch entity directly.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: The paired smart light (relay resolved automatically) or a switch to cycle directly.

power_cycle_delay.name: Power-cycle delay
power_cycle_delay.description: Seconds to keep the relay off before turning it back on.
